unit.title: FC-LS Fabric Login / FLOGI
unit.notes: Seed reading plan derived from FLOGI live QA traces. The plan intentionally decomposes the broad FLOGI question into focused, IR-oriented tasks.

task.title: FLOGI/PLOGI/LS_ACC payload layout from Table 149
task.reading_goal: Read Table 149 and its lead-in text. Produce word-by-word payload layout claims for Word 0 through Words 64-n, including Payload Bit=0 length, Payload Bit=1 extension fields, Words 21-24 obsolete, Class 6 reuse of Class 1 service parameters, and all conditional/variable-length rules.
completion_criteria: No Table 149 word range is summarized away.
Every word range from Word 0 through Words 64-n has a claim or explicit unresolved item.
Class 6 reuse of Class 1 parameters is grounded.
